calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Case is ordered dismissed pursuant to Gov't Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Plaintiff's counsel will also be reported to the State Bar as required by Business and Professions Code Section 6086.7(a)(3). JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Continued To Jul-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jul-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. The court shall notify the State Bar of all the Sanction Orders as required by the Business and Professions Code Section 6086.7(a)(3). This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
